AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.title: Aemeath
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.description:
Aemeath, once a resonance researcher at the academy.
She controls the flow of battle through Sync Rate and Resonance, building toward explosive turns.
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.cardsModifierDescripti: Aemeath cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.eventDeathPrevention: I can't fall here... not yet.
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.aromaPrinciple: [sine]Harmony must not fall to disorder... I must keep moving.[/sine]
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.unlockText: Play a single run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.

AEMEATH.hoverResonanceDescription: Your current Resonance ([img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]). Some Aemeath cards may require [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img] to play.
AEMEATH.hoverSyncDescription: Your current Sync Rate ([img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]). Some Aemeath cards may require [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img] to play.
AEMEATH.hoverEnergyDescription: Your current Energy ([img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img]). Cards require [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img] to play, and their cost is shown in the upper-left corner.
